title: Visitors Center | Balboa Park
content: # Visitors Center. Begin your Balboa Park adventure at the Visitors Center. You can find the latest Park information either at the Visitor Center located in the House of Hospitality or at the Park Ambassador Information Tent located in front of the building in the Plaza de Panama. Visitors Center entrance with green Visitors Center sign. Admittance to the Park itself is free, as is the Botanical Building and most of the gardens. Forever Balboa Park also offers private, custom tours of Balboa Park’s historic Central Mesa led by highly trained Balboa Park Visitors Center staff and volunteers; a great option for families, garden clubs, schools, corporate groups and more! Forever Balboa Park is a public-benefit 501(c)3 nonprofit organization to provide expertise, advocacy and resources to envision, enhance and sustain Balboa Park for all visitors in partnership with the City of San Diego and in collaboration with other organizations in the Park and the community.

title: Balboa Park San Francisco, CA - Last Updated June 2026
content: Have a little train enthusiast?! This place is perfect!! They have a train that goes around the park, and a carousel! Bathrooms are available throughout!
